```plantuml

package "preadapter" {

      {field} <color:red>o</color> SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML(SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML:preadapter.Logger)

      {field} <color:red>o</color> SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML.cu: CompilationUnit
    }
  }

  package "domain" {
    class Datastructure << (C,white) >> {
      {field} <color:green>o</color> class_to_datastructure: dict[String,SubDataStructure]
      {field} <color:green>o</color> namespace_to_datastructures: dict[String,list[SubDataStructure]]
      {field} <color:green>o</color> namespace_to_namespace_list: dict[String,list[String]]
      {field} <color:green>o</color> skip_types: list[String]

      --

      {method} <color:red>o</color> ResolveClassNames.method: Method
      {method} <color:red>o</color> ResolveClassNames.subDataStructure: SubDataStructure
      ==
      {method} <color:red>■</color> CorrectClassScope(CorrectClassScope:SubDataStructure, CorrectClassScope:list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC)

      {method} <color:green>o</color> GetFQDNForUsedClassName(GetFQDNForUsedClassName:SubDataStructure)

      ==

      {method} <color:green>o</color> append_sub_datastructure(append_sub_datastructure:SubDataStructure)
      ==
      {method} <color:green>o</color> append_class(append_class:list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC, append_class:list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC)
      {method} <color:red>o</color> append_class.sub_datastructure: SubDataStructure
      ==
      {method} <color:green>o</color> get_classname_list()
      {method} <color:green>o</color> get_datastructures_from_class_name()
    }
  }

  class Logger << (C,white) >> {
    {field} <color:blue>o</color> loggingType: preadapter.LoggingType
    --
    {method} <color:red>■</color> log()
    {method} <color:red>o</color> log.result: String_BRQTO__BRQTC
    --
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logError()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logError()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logWarning()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logWarning()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logInfo()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logInfo()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logDebug()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logDebug()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logTrace()
    {method} <color:green>o</color> logTrace()
  }
}

class RecursiveFileProcessor_BRQTO__BRQTC << (C,white) >> {
}

}
```
